title: RadiationCraft
description: A simple radiation plugin that introduces... radiation! Beware of unsafe water, radioactive mobs, and contaminated food!
body:
A simple radiation plugin that introduces... radiation! Beware of unsafe water, radioactive mobs, and contaminated food!

## ✨ Features:

- Radiation
- Adjustable radiation values for food via config
- Custom RadAway potions
- Effects triggered at different radiation levels

## Recipes:

- RadAway
  
    ![RadAway Receipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2913f06738ad0f4b58d2d7851e752173effbd08.png)
